hero.title: Built for Intelligent, Scalable Growth
hero.description: AdSyncro is an AI powered growth automation platform designed to help businesses grow with precision, efficiency, and confidence. We exist to replace fragmented marketing efforts with intelligent systems that scale.

whyExists.title: Why AdSyncro Exists
descriptionLines: Growth today is complex. Businesses face rising acquisition costs, fragmented data, compliance pressures, and limited operational bandwidth.
AdSyncro was built to solve this.
We combine automation, AI optimization, and sector expertise to create growth systems that are measurable, compliant, and designed for long term performance.

differentiators.title: Platform First Approach
differentiators.description: AdSyncro is built as a connected system — not isolated tactics. Every workflow, insight, and optimization feeds into a single growth engine.

differentiators.title: AI Driven by Design
differentiators.description: From lead scoring to performance optimization, AI powers decision making across the funnel.

differentiators.title: Sector Specific Expertise
differentiators.description: We specialize in retrofit & energy, regulated services, and growth focused SMEs — industries where precision matters.

differentiators.title: Compliance & Trust
differentiators.description: Privacy, governance, and auditability are embedded into every solution.

hero.title: Flexible Engagement Models Built for Scale
hero.description: AdSyncro offers transparent, value driven pricing designed to match your growth stage, technical maturity, and compliance requirements. Each engagement focuses on outcomes, automation depth, and long term scalability.

pricingPlans.name: Starter
pricingPlans.subtitle: For Early Stage or Pilot Engagements
pricingPlans.description: Designed for businesses beginning their automation and performance journey.

pricingPlans.name: Growth
pricingPlans.subtitle: For Businesses Ready to Scale
pricingPlans.description: Built for organizations seeking predictable demand and deeper automation.

pricingPlans.name: Enterprise
pricingPlans.subtitle: For Complex, Compliance Led Growth
pricingPlans.description: Tailored solutions for organizations with advanced requirements, multiple stakeholders, and strict governance.

faqs.question: What's included in the ad budget?
faqs.answer: The pricing shown is our management fee. Ad spend is separate and paid directly to the platforms (Google, Facebook, etc.). We recommend a minimum ad budget of £2,000/month for Starter, £5,000/month for Growth, and £10,000+/month for Enterprise.

faqs.question: Is there a contract or minimum commitment?
faqs.answer: We require a 3-month minimum commitment to allow time for optimization and results. After that, all plans are month-to-month with 30 days notice to cancel.

faqs.question: What kind of results can I expect?
faqs.answer: While results vary by industry and competition, our clients typically see 2-3x ROI within 6 months. We focus on qualified leads, not just traffic, ensuring you get homeowners ready to retrofit.

faqs.question: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! You can upgrade at any time. Downgrades take effect at the start of your next billing cycle.

faqs.question: Do you offer custom packages?
faqs.answer: Yes! If none of our standard plans fit your needs, we can create a custom package. Contact our sales team to discuss your specific requirements.

faqs.question: What makes AdSyncro different from other agencies?
faqs.answer: We specialize exclusively in retrofit and green energy marketing. Our team understands EPC data, grant systems, and homeowner psychology. Plus, we leverage AI automation to maximize efficiency and results.
